title: penstemon clevelandii var. stephensii
intro: Penstemon clevelandii var. stephensii, also known as Cleveland's penstemon or Stephens' beardtongue, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the penstemon family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Penstemon clevelandii var. stephensii include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
